title: aconitum × suspensum
intro: Aconitum × suspensum, a hybrid plant of the Aconitum genus, is a type of flowering plant known for its vibrant purple flowers and toxic properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving compounds. The health benefits of Aconitum × suspensum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat rheumatism, although it should be used with caution due to its toxicity. Aconitum × suspensum is often prepared as a tincture or extract, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
